title: miaow
description: New keybinds let you miaow (meow), hiss or purr. Crouch and miaow to sound like a stray cat.
body:
## How to use
- Press G to miaow!
- Press G while crouching to miaow like a stray cat
- Press H to hiss
- Press J to purr

All keybinds are configurable.


## Multiplayer support
- Required on the server
- Optional on the client: you don't need the mod to hear others miaow. You need the mod if you want to miaow
